meaning: adj.鍗板埛涓婄殑,鎺掑瓧涓婄殑
examples: Because of a typographical error, the town of Longridge was spelt as Longbridge.
And some of those would have typographical or grammatical errors in their applications.
Beyond giving writers a spur to eloquence, what the historian Elizabeth Eisenstein calls "typographical fixity" served as a cultural preservative.
